content.en:
When the Yang of All Things arrived, Ye Tian left the Void Source Hall and returned to the Dark Forbidden Domain.

As the birthplace of Ye Tian, the Dark Forbidden Domain naturally attaches great importance to heaven and earth, and he has a great confidence that he will be promoted to the invincible in the future, if he cultivates two more supreme beings, the dark forbidden domain can be promoted to the eternal heaven and earth.

But if there are no special circumstances, there is no hope for the birth of the other two supreme beings in the Dark Forbidden Domain, but the Yang of All Things can change the potential and physique of the human race, etc., which gives the human race a glimmer of hope.

With his help, it is not impossible for two more supreme beings to be born in the future.

Dark Forbidden Realm.

Ye Tian placed the Yang of All Things in the center of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and used the Yang of All Things to radiate and illuminate the entire Dark Forbidden Domain.

In addition, he sealed off the area where the sun of all things was located, not allowing any humans to approach it, and the invincible clone sat here.

As for the Xumi Golden Mountain, he didn't pay much attention to it.

Under the influence of the Yang of All Things, the human race has undergone tremendous changes.

In the world of the human race, a child is born, and as soon as he is born, he is comparable to a powerful warrior, and his body is brilliant, and he is not an ordinary person at first glance.

The locals thought the child was the reincarnation of some powerful person, but then they found out that all newborn children were like that.

In addition, some ordinary people have also found that their strength has improved by leaps and bounds, their bodies are getting stronger and stronger, and some disabled people have also returned to normal.

Many people are puzzled and think that this world has changed specially.

However, the higher-ups knew very well that this change was not limited to one world, but affected the entire Dark Forbidden Domain.

Through the high-level of the Terran, many people knew that the reason for the change was that Ye Tian, the strongest man of the Terran Race, had brought a treasure that could change the potential and foundation of the Terran race, so that future generations would become stronger, and eventually compare to the powerful race in the Eternal Heaven and Earth.

Suddenly, the human race was boiling, and countless people were excited, and even began to cultivate a large number of offspring, thus making the family more powerful.

In addition, this kind of influence is continuous, as long as it is the human race under the ancestor, it will become stronger and stronger under the influence of the Yang of All Things, and the potential will become more and more terrifying.

......

"It's time to hit the realm of second-class invincibles!"

Ye Tian decided.

He had been procrastinating for a long time in the third-rank invincible realm, and there was no point in continuing to delay.

He can barely continue to improve now, and he has to break through.

As for the security of the Dark Forbidden Realm, he didn't need to worry too much.

Although the second-class invincible cannot enter the foreign world, if the dark forbidden realm is really in danger, the invincible clone has not yet broken through to the second-class invincible realm, and can still sit in the dark forbidden realm, this invincible clone, he is ready to stay in the third-class invincible realm, and will not be promoted, unless the dark forbidden realm is promoted to the eternal world one day, the invincible clone will continue to break through.

Ye Tian did not choose to break through in the Dark Forbidden Domain, but chose to break through in the Void Source Palace's own cultivation space.

Void Source Palace, cultivation space.

Ye Tian began his cultivation retreat here, allowing his soul to undergo realm calamity cultivation.

Now, his soul was already extremely powerful, and it was naturally easy to carry out the Tribulation Realm cultivation.

"Start your first soul tribulation!"

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian's soul began to suffer from the rule thunder, rule flame, and rule wind knife from heaven and earth...... But these attacks were like tickling for Ye Tian.

Soon, the first crossing was over.

At this time, if calculated in terms of the Soul Tribulation Realm, he is now in the Soul Tribulation Realm.

After resting for a while, Ye Tian began to carry out the second tribulation.

The second tribulation, Ye Tian was also very relaxed, after all, how powerful his soul was, much stronger than many invincible people who had been promoted from the soul tribulation realm.

Three Tribulations!

Four Tribulations!

......

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to complete the Nine Tribulations and become the Soul Nine Tribulation Realm, which was at the same level as the original Flesh Nine Tribulation Realm.

Breaking through from the Soul Nine Tribulation Realm to the Invincible Realm was very simple for Ye Tian, but it also required a lot of resources.

I saw that Ye Tian had prepared a lot of robbery stones, absorbing the energy of the robbery stones to help him break the shackles and be promoted to the realm of soul invincible.

Rumble!!!!

The soul broke through and crossed over to the realm of the invincible, and the soul at this time can be called the invincible and indestructible soul.

If a sixth-rank invincible immortal soul was to be promoted to a third-rank invincible immortal soul, the difficulty would be very great, but Ye Tian's own realm was in the third-rank invincible realm, so he could quickly rise to the third-rank invincible realm.

Of course, the Soul Invincible can also cultivate the Invincible Body Robbery Method, after all, the Soul Invincible Body Robbery also belongs to a type of Invincible Body Robbery.

Therefore, Ye Tian let the soul rob the body to cultivate the Endless Source Body, the Void Source Body Method.

Ye Tian himself had already cultivated the Endless Source Body, so letting the soul cultivate the Endless Source Body would not consume additional Eternal Source Matter energy and Void Source Crystal, otherwise Ye Tian would have to continue to search for the Void Source Crystal.

The next few years will be very simple, just consume a lot of resources to cultivate.

With his contribution value in the Heavenly Wind Sea, it is enough to exchange a large amount of resources to meet his cultivation needs, and there will be no shortage of resources at all.

In just one Great Tribulation Period, Ye Tian had successfully cultivated his soul to the ultimate realm of a third-rank invincible, reaching the same level as his physical body.

A third-class invincible person in the physical robbery realm, and a third-class invincible person in the soul robbery realm.

When both realms reach such a level, the metamorphosis begins.

I saw that Ye Tian's soul and body seemed to have broken the shackles, and it seemed that under the effect of mutual influence, the limit was greatly increased.

Subsequently, Ye Tian absorbed countless resources, whether it was his body or soul, they all skyrocketed many times.

At this moment, he is already a second-class invincible, and when he cultivates his body and soul to the limit of a second-class invincible, he can try to perfectly integrate the physical body tribulation realm and the soul tribulation realm, so as to step into the first-class invincible realm, but this step is bound to be very difficult and will take a long time.

"With my current strength, even many first-class invincible people are probably not my opponents!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He still has a lot of room for improvement because he has just broken through.

Therefore, Ye Tian did not leave the customs immediately, but continued to cultivate.

Besides, his body doesn't need to go out, just copy his body and act in the outside world.
